questions.question_text_full: Each of the digits in the number 5238641 is arranged in ascending order from left to right. The position(s) of how many digits will remain unchanged as compared to that/those in the original number?
questions.notes: The options were labeled a, b, c, d in the source; mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full:
A statement is followed by two arguments I and II. Read the statement and the arguments carefully and select the appropriate answer from the given options.

Statement: Hydroelectricity is a cleaner and greener energy than other forms of power generation.
Arguments:
(I) Hydroelectric plants almost have nil CO2 emissions.
(II) Hydroelectric power projects submerge huge amounts under water thereby affecting local flora and fauna.

options.text: Both I and II weaken the statement.
II weakens while I strengthens the statement.
Both I and II strengthen the statement.
I weakens while II strengthens the statement.

questions.notes: The options were labeled a, b, c, d in the source; mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

warnings: No correct answer indicators (green ticks) were present on the page for either question.
